programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: K9 Tipster comes face-to-face with a familiar face, a repeat offender who remembers their last encounter all too well; K9 Murphy, a battle-tested German Shepherd with over a hundred deployments under his collar, is called in when a crash scene turns into a manhunt; meanwhile, K9 Murph tears into action, tracking down a suspect whose joyride breaks one too many laws; and K9 Guapo, arguably the most

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: A car in Volusia County with an alleged stolen tag is chased by a helicopter and on the ground by deputies. A father in Citrus County calls the cops when his son steals his pickup truck. Police in Fort Bend are in pursuit of a stolen school bus.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: K9 Cisco responds to a break-in at the last place you'd ever expect - the Fraternal Order of Police Lodge while K9 Karma is deployed on a combative suspect who refuses to go quietly into the night. After his handler is struck by a vehicle, K9 Jakko continues on the pursuit alone, locking onto the trail of an armed suspect and when K9 Mickey makes the takedown, he pays a painful price in the proces

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: From tangled brush to pitch-black streets, these K9s sniff out danger with precision; after a tense pursuit, K9 Eddie corners a suspect hiding deep in a ravine; across the country, K9 Streeter makes a heart-stopping leap; K9 Riggs corners a double murder suspect; K9 Diesel kicks off his late-night shift by chasing down a hit-and-run perp.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: Every search has a conclusion: whether it's finding a missing person or chasing a suspect on the run, a police K9 makes sure it ends with answers; K9 Pandora wastes no time bringing relief to a desperate family looking for a family member; K9s Jet and Cheney tag-team a fugitive who tears up the roadway and refuses to stop; K9 Karma shuts down a belligerent man fighting arrest; and K-9 Endo follows

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
